positive: Minimalist celestial landscape illustration, featuring a stylized cosmic blend of deep indigo, ethereal teal, and pops of gold and cream. The central subject is a crescent moon rendered as a glowing beacon, surrounded by abstract constellations formed by interconnected geometric lines and softly glowing nebulae clouds. The style should be highly detailed linework combined with smooth, gradient digital painting. Composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for clean, impactful apparel printing. Include subtle, repeating geometric patterns (like mandalas or tessellations) in the background to add texture without distracting from the central elements. Strong, crisp lines, high contrast between the dark background and the glowing celestial bodies. Studio quality, vector-art feel, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photography, photorealism, messy lines, grainy, jpeg artifacts
